unavailable_text: 2005-03-01	BODY ATTACHMENT ISSUED CIVIL WARRANT OF BODY ATTACHMENT (BENCH WARRANT) ISSUED THIS DATE FROM COURT HEARING OF 10/27/04 @ 8:30AM WITH $1,500.00 CASH ONLY BAIL AND VOLUNTARY RETURN RESTRICTED TO ANY FRIDAY MORNING OR PRODUCTION BY SHERIFF'S DEPT. ON ANY WEEK DAY.
